post_content:
Our Story

Founded in 2015 by marine biologist Dr. James Chen and aquarium design expert Sarah Williams, AquaLuxe began as a small specialty shop dedicated to rare ornamental fish species. What started as a passion project quickly evolved into a comprehensive aquatic service company as we recognized the need for expert guidance and premium solutions in the ornamental fish industry.

Today, AquaLuxe has grown into a leading provider of high-end aquatic specimens, custom aquarium design, and professional maintenance services. Our team of specialists combines scientific knowledge with artistic vision to create stunning aquatic displays that serve as living works of art in homes and businesses across the country.

Our Mission

At AquaLuxe, our mission is to promote the appreciation of aquatic life through responsible practices, education, and exceptional service. We strive to:

  • Source the highest quality ornamental fish through ethical and sustainable means
  • Create custom aquatic environments that enhance both the well-being of aquatic life and the aesthetic appeal of any space
  • Provide comprehensive education and support to help our clients succeed in the hobby
  • Advance aquarium technology and techniques through continuous research and development
  • Contribute to conservation efforts that protect natural aquatic habitats

Our Team

Our diverse team of aquatic specialists includes marine biologists, freshwater experts, aquarium technicians, and award-winning aquascapers. Each team member brings unique expertise and passion to their role, ensuring that every aspect of our service meets the highest standards of quality and care.

Leadership

Dr. James Chen, Co-Founder & CEO
With a Ph.D. in Marine Biology and over 15 years of experience in ornamental fish breeding, Dr. Chen oversees our fish acquisition and breeding programs, ensuring the health and quality of every specimen we offer.

Sarah Williams, Co-Founder & Creative Director
An internationally recognized aquarium designer with a background in interior architecture, Sarah leads our design team in creating custom aquatic installations that harmonize with their surrounding environments.

Michael Rodriguez, Operations Director
With extensive experience in logistics and customer service, Michael ensures the smooth operation of our facilities and the timely delivery of our products and services.

Specialists

Our team includes specialists in:

  • Freshwater and marine fish husbandry
  • Aquatic plant cultivation
  • Coral propagation
  • Custom aquarium design and installation
  • Water chemistry and filtration technology
  • Aquascaping and hardscape arrangement
  • Aquarium maintenance and troubleshooting

Our Facilities

Located in Coral City, Florida, our state-of-the-art facilities include:

Breeding Center

Our 10,000-square-foot breeding center houses specialized systems for various fish species, allowing us to maintain genetic diversity and reduce reliance on wild-caught specimens. The facility includes:

  • Dedicated breeding rooms with species-specific water parameters
  • Advanced filtration and water treatment systems
  • Specialized lighting and temperature control
  • Quarantine and conditioning areas

Design Studio

Our design studio serves as the creative hub where our team develops custom aquarium concepts. Equipped with 3D modeling software, material samples, and a showroom of completed projects, the studio allows clients to visualize their custom aquatic displays before installation begins.

Retail Showroom

Our elegant showroom displays a curated selection of ornamental fish, aquatic plants, and premium aquarium equipment. Visitors can explore various aquascaping styles, interact with our knowledgeable staff, and find inspiration for their own aquatic projects.

Sustainability Commitment

AquaLuxe is committed to environmental responsibility and sustainable practices:

Captive Breeding

We prioritize captive-bred specimens over wild-caught fish whenever possible, helping to reduce pressure on natural populations. Our breeding program focuses on rare and endangered species, contributing to conservation efforts while providing hobbyists with healthy, ethically sourced specimens.

Responsible Sourcing

When wild-caught specimens are necessary, we work exclusively with suppliers who adhere to sustainable collection methods and fair trade practices. We carefully track the origin of each specimen to ensure it was collected legally and ethically.

Conservation Initiatives

A portion of our profits supports aquatic habitat conservation projects around the world. We also participate in species preservation programs in collaboration with research institutions and conservation organizations.

Eco-Friendly Operations

Our facilities incorporate energy-efficient systems, water recycling technology, and sustainable materials to minimize our environmental footprint.

Awards and Recognition

AquaLuxe has been recognized for excellence in the aquarium industry:

  • Best Custom Aquarium Design - Aquatic Design Awards, 2023
  • Excellence in Ornamental Fish Breeding - International Aquaculture Association, 2022
  • Top Aquarium Maintenance Service - Luxury Lifestyle Awards, 2021
  • Innovation in Aquarium Technology - Aquatic Industry Expo, 2020
  • Best Aquascaping Design - International Aquascaping Contest, 2019

Join the AquaLuxe Community

Whether you're a seasoned aquarist or just beginning your aquatic journey, we invite you to experience the AquaLuxe difference. Visit our showroom, attend one of our workshops, or schedule a consultation to discover how we can bring the beauty of aquatic life into your space.

post_content:
Get in Touch

We're here to answer your questions and provide expert guidance for all your aquatic needs. Whether you're interested in our ornamental fish collection, custom aquarium design services, or maintenance plans, our team is ready to assist you.

Send Us a Message

[contact-form-7 id="123" title="Contact Form"]

Contact Information

Address:
123 Aquarium Way
Coral City, FL 33333
United States

Phone:
+1 (555) 123-4567

Email:
info@aqualuxe.com

Hours:
Monday-Friday: 9am-6pm
Saturday: 10am-4pm
Sunday: Closed

Visit Our Showroom

Experience our stunning collection of ornamental fish and custom aquarium displays in person. Our showroom features various aquascaping styles, rare fish species, and the latest in aquarium technology.

Schedule a Consultation

Interested in a custom aquarium design or maintenance service? Schedule a consultation with our experts to discuss your specific needs and requirements. We offer both in-person and virtual consultations for your convenience.

Book a Consultation

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you ship fish nationwide?

Yes, we ship our ornamental fish throughout the continental United States using specialized shipping methods to ensure they arrive safely. All shipments include heat or cold packs as needed and are delivered via overnight service.

What areas do you service for aquarium installation and maintenance?

We provide installation and maintenance services throughout the South Florida region, including Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties. For locations outside this area, please contact us to discuss options.

Do you offer warranties on your aquariums and equipment?

Yes, all custom aquariums come with a comprehensive warranty. Equipment warranties vary by manufacturer, but we handle all warranty claims on behalf of our clients.

Can you maintain aquariums that were not installed by AquaLuxe?

Absolutely! Our maintenance team can service any aquarium, regardless of who installed it. We'll conduct an initial assessment to determine the specific needs of your system.

Do you offer financing options for larger installations?

Yes, we offer financing options for qualifying customers on custom aquarium installations. Please inquire during your consultation for details.

post_content:
Comprehensive Aquarium Services

AquaLuxe offers a complete range of professional aquarium services designed to meet the needs of both residential and commercial clients. From initial design and installation to ongoing maintenance and specialized care, our expert team provides solutions for every aspect of aquarium ownership.

Custom Design & Installation

Transform your space with a custom-designed aquarium that perfectly complements your aesthetic and meets your specific requirements. Our design team works closely with you to create a unique aquatic display that serves as a stunning focal point in your home or business.

Learn More

Professional Maintenance

Keep your aquarium in pristine condition with our comprehensive maintenance services. Our technicians handle everything from water changes and cleaning to equipment checks and water quality testing, ensuring a healthy environment for your aquatic life.

Learn More

Artistic Aquascaping

Transform your aquarium into a stunning underwater landscape with our professional aquascaping services. Our award-winning aquascapers create living works of art using premium hardscape materials and carefully selected plants.

Learn More

Expert Consultation

Benefit from our team's extensive knowledge and experience with personalized consultation services. Whether you're planning a new aquarium, troubleshooting issues, or seeking advice on species selection, our experts provide valuable guidance tailored to your specific situation.

Learn More

Aquarium Relocation

Moving your aquarium requires specialized knowledge and equipment to ensure the safety of your aquatic life and the integrity of your system. Our relocation service handles every aspect of the process, from preparation and transportation to setup and stabilization at the new location.

Learn More

Emergency Services

Aquarium emergencies require immediate attention to prevent loss of aquatic life. Our emergency response team is available to address critical issues such as leaks, equipment failures, water quality crashes, and disease outbreaks, providing rapid intervention when you need it most.

Learn More

Specialized Services

Commercial Installations

Create a memorable impression with a custom aquarium installation for your business. We design and install stunning aquatic displays for restaurants, hotels, offices, medical facilities, and retail spaces, providing ongoing maintenance to ensure your investment continues to impress clients and visitors.

Breeding Programs

Establish a successful breeding program for rare or specialized fish species with our expert guidance. We provide comprehensive support, from system design and species selection to conditioning, spawning techniques, and fry rearing, helping you achieve your breeding goals.

Custom Filtration Solutions

Optimize your aquarium's water quality with a custom filtration system designed specifically for your tank's size, bioload, and inhabitants. Our engineers create efficient, reliable filtration solutions that maintain pristine water conditions while minimizing maintenance requirements.

Lighting Design

Enhance the visual impact of your aquarium with professional lighting design. We create custom lighting solutions that showcase your aquatic display while providing optimal conditions for fish and plant health, incorporating the latest LED technology for energy efficiency and programmable effects.

Service Plans

We offer flexible service plans to meet the needs of different aquarium types and client preferences:

Our Service Area

We provide on-site services throughout the South Florida region, including:

  • Miami-Dade County
  • Broward County
  • Palm Beach County

For clients outside our service area, we offer virtual consultation services and can recommend trusted partners in your location.

Request a Service

Ready to experience the AquaLuxe difference? Contact us to discuss your aquarium needs and schedule a service.

Contact Us
